title: Building 'The Dasheri Shield' at University Hackathon
excerpt: The technical story of how our team built an Agri-Tech prototype, automated crop health diagnostics, and placed in the top 15 out of 44 teams.
content:
## The Challenge
At our university hackathon, we were faced with a critical theme: **Sustainable Technology**. Our team decided to focus on agriculture, specifically crop health monitoring.

## The Technical Architecture
We engineered a modular web prototype using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript. The system simulates live crop sensor feeds and logs agricultural changes.

### Optimization
One of our main achievements was replacing slow manual logs with dynamic, automated forms, saving about **30% in logging efficiency**. This meant faster diagnostic updates.

## The Presentation
Competing against 44 university teams was intense, but our robust solution structure secured us a position in the **top 15 teams**.

title: Mastering Data Structures with Python and C
excerpt: Insights from a Computer Science undergrad on balancing lower-level memory management in C with clean OOP design in Python.
content:
## The Foundation of Computer Science
As a B.Tech CSE student at Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University, building a strong core in Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA) is essential.

### Why C and Python?
- **C Programming** forces you to understand memory addresses, pointers, and manual structures (like singly-linked lists).
- **Python** allows quick algorithmic testing, rapid prototyping of arrays, trees, and graphs.

## Practical Tips
1. Always trace your pointers on paper first.
2. Study big-O time and space complexity for every loop.
3. Solve interactive debugging challenges regularly to hone your analytical reflexes.

title: Creating High-End UI Animations with Canvas and CSS
excerpt: Learn how to build elite, high-performance web animations that look luxury and cinematic without stalling user interactions.
content:
## Cinematic Web Design
Awwwards portfolios stand out because of interaction. However, heavy animation can cause page sluggishness.

### Our Approach
- **Canvas particles**: Render 1000s of dust nodes in a single WebGL paint call rather than polluting the DOM with 1000s of HTML tags.
- **CSS 3D Transforms**: Leverage GPU-accelerated layout positioning for interactive tilt containers.
- **Framer Motion**: Group staggered transitions for text block reveals.

By ensuring calculations are lightweight and responsive, we keep visual elements fluid at a lock-tight **60 FPS**.
